rules.title: Josi Pilates Studio Rules
rules.subtitle: Please read and follow these important guidelines
rules.classDurationDesc: Information about class length and structure
rules.classDurationText: Classes have a duration of 55 minutes
rules.arrivalPolicyDesc: When to arrive for your classes
rules.arrivalPolicyText: Arrive at least 5 minutes before class starts
rules.arrivalPolicyDetail: We kindly ask that you arrive at least 5 minutes before the start of your class. This extra time allows for a smooth setup in the studio and ensures you can begin your session comfortably.
rules.cancellationPolicyDesc: Important information about canceling or rescheduling classes
rules.cancellationPolicyDetail: If you need to cancel or reschedule your session, please make sure to inform us at least 24 hours in advance.
rules.cancellationWarning: Failure to comply with this policy will result in the loss of the class.
rules.additionalGuidelinesDesc: Other important information for a great experience
rules.wearComfortableClothingDesc: Please wear appropriate athletic wear that allows for movement.
rules.stayHydratedDesc: Remember to drink water before and after your class.
rules.respectSpaceDesc: Please be mindful of other students and maintain a positive environment.
rules.contactIntro: If you have any questions about these rules or need assistance, please don't hesitate to contact us:

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to Josi Pilates Studio. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose and protect your information when you use our application and services.

autoCollected.title: 2.2 Automatically Collected Information
items: Device information (device type, operating system, app version)

thirdParty.title: 2.3 Information from Third Parties
items: Data from Google when you sign in with your Google account
Payment processor data for class purchases

dataUsage.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
items: Provide and manage your pilates services
Send important notifications about classes and schedule changes
Improve our app and services through analytics
Process in-app purchases and manage credits

dataSharing.title: 4. Information Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following circumstances:
items: To protect our rights and safety

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.

dataRetention.title: 7. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. Account data is retained while your account is active and for a reasonable period thereafter. You can request deletion of your data at any time.

childrenPrivacy.title: 8. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: Our app is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

internationalTransfers.title: 9. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your data during such transfers.

cookies.title: 10. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We may use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your app experience, remember your preferences, and analyze app usage. You can manage these through your device settings.

policyChanges.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
policyChanges.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you about significant changes through the app or by email.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the Josi Pilates Studio app, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the app.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Service Description
serviceDescription.content: Josi Pilates Studio provides a platform for scheduling, managing and tracking pilates classes. Our services include:
items: Scheduling of individual and group classes

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
eligibility.content: To use our services, you must be at least 18 years old or have parental/guardian consent. You agree to provide accurate and up-to-date information.

userAccounts.title: 4. User Accounts
userAccounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

purchases.title: 5.1 Credit Purchases
purchases.content: Class credits can be purchased through the app. All payments are processed securely and are final, except as stated in our refund policy.

cancellation.title: 5.2 Cancellation Policy
cancellation.content: Classes can be canceled or rescheduled with at least 24 hours notice. Late cancellations or unjustified absences will result in loss of the class credit.

refunds.title: 5.3 Refunds
refunds.content: Unused credits can be refunded upon written request, subject to administrative fees.

studioRules.title: 6. Studio Rules
studioRules.content: By participating in classes, you agree to follow all studio rules and guidelines, including but not limited to:
items: Arrive at least 5 minutes before class starts

userConduct.title: 7. User Conduct
items: Use the app for any illegal purpose
Attempt to access unauthorized system areas

intellectualProperty.title: 8. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All app content, including text, graphics, logos and software, is owned by Josi Pilates Studio or its licensors and is protected by copyright laws.

liabilityLimitation.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
liabilityLimitation.content: Josi Pilates Studio is not liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from app use. Our total liability is limited to the amount paid for services.

warrantyDisclaimer.title: 10. Warranty Disclaimer
warrantyDisclaimer.content: The app is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not warrant that the app will always be available or error-free.

indemnification.title: 11. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify and hold Josi Pilates Studio harmless from any claim, loss or damage arising from misuse of the app.

termination.title: 12. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to the app at any time, without notice, for violation of these terms.

governingLaw.title: 13. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Quebec, Canada. Any dispute will be resolved in the competent courts of Montreal.

termsChanges.title: 14. Changes to Terms
termsChanges.content: We may modify these terms at any time. Continuing to use the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 15. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact:

hero.intro: Nice to meet you, I'm Josi!
hero.description: Particular classes, duos, and small groups with Josiane — certified Pilates instructor and movement specialist. Personalized attention, improving your posture, and injury prevention.
hero.title: Pilates that takes care of your body, in small groups.
hero.note: First introductory session — ideal for starting out.

about.title: About Josiane
about.subtitle: Movement with intention, progress with clarity.
about.description: Josiane combines her deep knowledge of movement and anatomy with a dedicated practice of Pilates to offer a unique guidance in Montreal. Each session is adapted to your body, your goals, and your rhythm.
about.extended: In small groups or privately, the focus is on the quality of movement, improving your posture, and injury prevention — so you leave stronger, more mobile, and more peaceful.

studioHome.testimonialsSubtitle: Real experiences from our Pilates community in Montreal.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Find the option that suits you
services.subtitleDesc: Flexible packages that save you money on multiple sessions. All levels are welcome.

private.title: Private
private.intro: One-on-one session, complete attention to your posture.
private.note: Packages are valid for 4 months. Any cancellation must be made at least 24 hours in advance. Packages are non-refundable and non-transferable.

duos.title: Duo
duos.intro: For two — friends or couples, guaranteed motivation.
duos.note: Price for two people. Packages are valid for 4 months. Any cancellation must be made at least 24 hours in advance. Packages are non-refundable and non-transferable.

group.title: Group
group.intro: Small group — a social and stimulating workout.
group.note: Price per person. Packages are valid for 4 months. Any cancellation must be made at least 24 hours in advance. Packages are non-refundable and non-transferable.

ctaBand.title: Ready to start your journey?
ctaBand.subtitle: Book your introductory session and discover Pilates guided by a certified movement expert.

testimonials.text: Josi completely changed my relationship with my body. Her knowledge in anatomy and posture makes all the difference — I no longer have back pain.
Duo classes with my partner have become our favorite ritual. Personalized attention and always a welcoming atmosphere.
A complete beginner, I felt confident from the very first session. The small group really allows for quality tracking.

contact.title: Have a question? Write to us
contact.subtitle: We reply quickly. Tell us your goal and we will guide you to the best option.
contact.successText: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you soon.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and we will contact you.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Josi Pilates Studio. All rights reserved.
footer.tagline: Pilates studio in Montreal. Particular, duo, and small group classes with a certified instructor.

dashboard.todayClassesDesc: Scheduled classes for today will appear here.
dashboard.todayClassesDescSub: Phase 2: Dynamic calendar integration and attendance.
dashboard.quickPanelDesc: Birthday information and quick notifications will appear here.

deleteDialog.title: Move Student to Trash?
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to move {{name}} to the trash?
deleteDialog.warning: The profile will become inactive, but class history and credits will be preserved.
deleteDialog.reversible: This action can be undone within 90 days.

restoreDialog.title: Restore Student?
restoreDialog.warning: The profile will reappear in the active students list. Classes will need to be re-enrolled manually.

hardDeleteDialog.title: ⚠️ Permanent Deletion
hardDeleteDialog.about: You are about to permanently delete the student {{name}}.
hardDeleteDialog.warning: This action is irreversible. Class history, credits and student data will be lost forever.

classes.deleteClassConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this class? This will also delete all associated schedules.

attendance.title: Attendance Report
attendance.subtitle: Monitor the presence, excused and unexcused absences of each student
attendance.filtersSubtitle: Select the date range and student to get a detailed attendance analysis
attendance.emptyStateDesc: Click the "Generate Report" button above to load attendance stats and information.

lowCredits.title: Low Credits Report
lowCredits.subtitle: Track and notify students with zero credits or near the defined limit
lowCredits.limitConfigDesc: Set the maximum credits value to consider a student's balance as "low" (currently: ≤ {{total}} credits)
lowCredits.lowCreditsDesc: List of students with total credits equal or below {{total}}
lowCredits.zeroCreditsDesc: Critical cases — students with no remaining balance or negative values
lowCredits.allCaughtUpDesc: Excellent! No students have zero or negative balances at the moment.
lowCredits.noStudentsDesc: There are no students with credits equal to or below the limit based on the current search.

creditHistory.subtitle: View the credit purchase and consumption transactions of all students

creditHistory.emptyStateDesc: Select a date range above and click "Search" to load the transactions.
creditHistory.noTransactionsDesc: We did not find any credit history records for the selected period.
creditHistory.summaryDesc: Total amounts collected and count of transactions in the period

financial.summaryDesc: Total amounts and transaction counts grouped by payment method

customCard.contentDesc: Write the email or use a template from the corresponding tab
customCard.senderPlaceholder: Ex: Teacher Josi, Josi Pilates Studio
customCard.consentDesc: This template will send the Pilates lessons policies and terms document directly with a PDF attachment to the selected students.

templates.title: Email Templates
